crud module¶

Module for CRUD operations on Users and Contacts. Contains functions to interact with the database using SQLAlchemy.

crud.create_contact(db: sqlalchemy.orm.Session, contact: ContactCreate, user_id: int)[source]¶

Create a new contact for a specific user.

Parameters:

  • db – Database session.

  • contact – Contact data schema.

  • user_id – ID of the user creating the contact.

Returns:

The newly created Contact object.

crud.create_user(db: sqlalchemy.orm.Session, user: UserCreate)[source]¶

Create a new user in the database with a hashed password.

Parameters:

  • db – Database session.

  • user – User schema containing email and password.

Returns:

The newly created User object.

crud.delete_contact(db: sqlalchemy.orm.Session, contact_id: int, user_id: int)[source]¶

Delete a contact from the database.

Parameters:

  • db – Database session.

  • contact_id – ID of the contact to delete.

  • user_id – ID of the user who owns the contact.

Returns:

Deleted Contact object if found, else None.

crud.get_contact(db: sqlalchemy.orm.Session, contact_id: int, user_id: int)[source]¶

Get a single contact by its ID and owner’s ID.

Parameters:

  • db – Database session.

  • contact_id – ID of the contact.

  • user_id – ID of the user who owns the contact.

Returns:

Contact object if found, else None.

crud.get_contacts(db: sqlalchemy.orm.Session, user_id: int, skip: int = 0, limit: int = 100)[source]¶

Get a list of contacts belonging to a specific user.

Parameters:

  • db – Database session.

  • user_id – ID of the user who owns the contacts.

  • skip – Number of records to skip (for pagination).

  • limit – Maximum number of records to return.

Returns:

List of Contact objects.

crud.get_user_by_email(db: sqlalchemy.orm.Session, email: str)[source]¶

Retrieve a user from the database by their email address.

Parameters:

  • db – Database session.

  • email – The email address to search for.

Returns:

User object if found, else None.

crud.update_contact(db: sqlalchemy.orm.Session, contact_id: int, contact_update: ContactCreate, user_id: int)[source]¶

Update an existing contact’s details.

Parameters:

  • db – Database session.

  • contact_id – ID of the contact to update.

  • contact_update – New contact data schema.

  • user_id – ID of the user who owns the contact.

Returns:

Updated Contact object if found, else None.

crud.update_refresh_token(db: sqlalchemy.orm.Session, user: User, token: str | None)[source]¶

Update the refresh token for a specific user.

Parameters:

  • db – Database session.

  • user – The User object to update.

  • token – The new refresh token string or None to clear.
